emails.subject: FW: Two New Executing Brokers
emails.body: Sara and Marie, How is Monument coming along? They use Credit Lyonnais as their back office. We will use MSDW and GSI for Futures and Options. We will use Carr for Futures. I had given you a contact of Jackie Tokley, 207-3385740. Thanks, Sheila

emails.subject: FW: Two New Executing Brokers
emails.body: SS and MH. See addition of Deutche below. thanks.sg

emails.subject: FW: Two New Executing Brokers
emails.body: Sara and Marie, This was the contact for Monument. Thanks. Sheila

emails.subject: RE: Two New Executing Brokers
emails.body: RE: Two New Executing Brokers Sheila: please see my comments below about the correct Enron company for (only futures and options?) appropriate type of transaction.
